initiatives.name: Peace Iowa
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through peace education and nonviolent action in Iowa City. They coordinate educational programs, direct action, and solidarity networks while building power through anti-war organizing, conflict resolution training, and creating spaces for peace and social justice.

initiatives.name: Iowa City Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: We are IC Mutual Aid. We work to meet the survival needs of the people whom our systems continuously fail.

initiatives.name: Iowa City Fridge
initiatives.description: Take what you need. Leave what you can.

initiatives.name: Corridcor Community Action Network
initiatives.description: Corridor Community Action Network serves to facilitate resident participation and empowerment, raising awareness about opportunities to improve the quality of life for all individuals in the Iowa Corridor.
